missions.name: Extradition
missions.summary: Contractors secure the extradition of a publicly hated man

briefing.mission:
9 years ago, four 19 year olds and one 20 year old, 3 from Drovak, two local, all of them taking a gap year to travel before school, were brutally murdered by Max Burke.

The travelers were using waterways to camp throughout the region, and had set up camp on the bank of the river opposite of Burke's manor.

Around 3 AM, Burke killed 2 of them outside of their tents while they were out for a walk, and then proceeded to enter the tents, killing two more of the travelers. He then took the remaining traveler hostage, and held her captive in his manor for over 48 hours, before she died of her wounds. Burke himself took part in the search operation looking for her, but eventually K9 units were able to trace the scent to Burke's manor, where they found the last traveler, who by that time had passed away from her injuries. Only the 2 bodies in the tents and the one in the manor were found, as the body of the first two victims were washed away by the river and never found. Burke was charged with 3 counts of second degree murder, and 1 count of criminally impeding a law enforcement operation.

During the trial, Burke's defense team argued that he was mentally unstable, and he claimed earlier in the evening that the travelers had provoked and mocked him while trespassing on his property, although no evidence of this was ever found. Burke had no prior history of violence, but had been living in reclusion since the passing of his wife 13 years prior.

Burke served 19 months in prison before being quietly allowed to return to his manor under house arrest, where he has remained since.

As part of a recent negotiation between Stubbhult and Drovak, Drovak requested the extradition of Max Burke to face charges for the murder of the Drovak citizen that was never recovered. The recent attention on Max Burke has caused his house arrest to become a security concern, and Stubbhult has agreed to the extradition in order to finalize the deal.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Secure the transportation of Max Burke from his home to Saxhult Flygfält

- Check and clear multiple paths to the Manor
- Choose a route to return him to the Airport

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Max Burke will remain in police custody until transfered to Drovak at the airfield
- Minimize his exposure to the public and media
- Obey the orders of the local authorities and law enforcement
- Avoid any unnecessary violence or confrontation

A representative from Drovak will be at the airport to take custody of Burke as he boards the plane.

The Stubbhult Regional Police are responsible for transporting Burke to the airport.

Burke's extradition is a high-profile event, and there may be media and observers present at any point.

missions.name: Grandiose Teachings
missions.summary: Contractors are hired to secure a town after a sudden attack

briefing.mission:
A group calling themselves "The True Sons", under the leadership of Pierre Ngunga, have taken control Lijnhaven and surrounding villages.

For the past several years, they have been recruiting Tanoan diaspora to their cause, promising a better, traditional, deserved future on their islands.

The True Sons follow the teachings of their leader, Ngunga, who has been preaching to them that they have a duty to reclaim their homeland from the globalist sellouts currently in power. They have acquired a significant amount of weaponry and resources, and have undergone training to prepare for this attack.

2 hours ago, a C-130 landed at Saint-Geroge Airstrip, full of weapons, ammunition, and supplies. Very soon after, they attacked the nearby town of Lijnhaven, attacking police in the area and the first Gendarmerie responders. The Gendarmerie have setup roadblocks and have held a perimeter around the region, but aren't capable of a full urban assault.

We have been hired to secure the town, assisting any surviving police and Gendarmerie forces, and to neutralize Pierre Ngunga. The True Sons have been broadcasting their attack on social media, so we have a good idea of where they are located within the town. We also know that they have taken several civilian hostages.

<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Secure Lijnhaven
- Neutralize Pierre Ngunga

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Assist surviving police and Gendarmerie forces
- Rescue civilian hostages

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- As per Gendarmerie orders, no explosives are allowed to be used in settlements, except for breaching charges

missions.name: Held in Trust
missions.summary: Contractors pay for the safe extraction of a unwelcome researcher

briefing.mission:
Dr. Adam Szulc, a researcher from the Vranna corporation, working on a project in the area, has been captured by a local militia.

Due to the risks of the region, his corporate insurance company, Kravtsov & Associates, has arranged for his safe extraction in exchange for a ransom payment.

Synixe Contractors has been hired to carry out the extraction.

The other members of the militia are unaware of the ransom agreement with some of their own members, and are still hunting for Dr. Szulc with the intention of executing him as a signal to foreign companies to stay out of the area. They will likely be hostile on sight, but may be able to be bribed.

To maintain the good faith of Kravtsov & Associates, it is important that Jamal Lamrani, the militia member who found Dr. Szulc and agreed to the ransom payment, is not betrayed and the rest of the militia are not made aware of the ransom agreement.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Extract Dr. Adam Szulc
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Kravtsov & Associates Corporate Insurance

A corporate insurance company specialising in high-risk regions

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Local Militia

Angry about previous attempts by foreign countries to extract resources from the area with little benefit to the local population. They are decently armed, but mainly on foot. They know the terrain well.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Jamal Lamrani
Location: <marker name='obj'>Meeting Marker</marker>

A member of the militia, he found Dr. Szulc, but doesn't want to be involved in his execution. He has agreed to a ransom payment.

missions.name: Rocketeering
missions.summary: Contractors destroy rocket artillery after a cross-border attack

briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy 6 rocket artillery vehicles

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>

missions.name: Where's My Ride?
missions.summary: Contractors must secure an LZ

briefing.mission:
Contractors were in the middle of a routine exercise when suddenly, they've been attacked.

The local militias have taken up arms, upset about Virelia's stance on the recent trade agreements.

We must defend our position while securing the area for our extraction team. Two Virelian UH-80s are on the way to extract us, but are around an hour and a half away.

The militias could possibly have anti-air capabilities, so we need to send a team to push out and confirm they are not in the area. We have lost all communication, so we have no way to delay the pilots.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Secure the LZ
- Destroy any anti-air assets in the area
- Destroy any equipment from the excercises
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelia

Virelia was trying to build trade and military alliances in the region. We were hired to conduct routine training excercises, but these did not take place.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>

Location: Surrounding the airfield

A mix of men with AKs and slightly more organized militias. Due to their high involvement with local military reservers, they may have access to a few pieces of military equipment.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Virelian Air Force
Location: Roughly 1:30 hours from the airfield

Two UH-80s are on the way to extract us, but we have lost all communication with them.

missions.name: Adept
missions.summary: Contractors use cartel's name to strike at CSP

briefing.mission:
With Asarta's ascension into the CSP alliance they have been inducted into the Peace and Stability program and their first task was supporting law enforcement operations against the Pruszków cartel in the Clara Islands.

Asartan forces have deployed onto the archipelago and have staged their operations at the main airfield. They began systematically disrupting the ground operations of the cartel by patrolling the jungle and raiding houses of important players on the island. Synixe has been hired to strike against the peacekeeping operations and embarrass the newest member of the CSP.

Two hours ago Asartan forces conducted a raid against one of the bosses of the cartel. VIA wants to recover Janusz "Parasol" Prasol. Our employer believes that the search of the property is still ongoing and the target should still be on site while police forces finish the search. Additional targets are the Asarta-held airfield and Gendarmerie's HQ in Santa Isabel.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Bring "Parasol" back to safety
- Stop Asartan operations on the airfield
- Destroy Gendarmerie's motorpool

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Free cartel members
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelian Intelligence Agency

With the arrival of Asartan peacekeepers balance of power in the region has shifted in CSP favor. They have many assets in the cartel's fight against current regime that has been vying for CSP protection for years. Their main objective is to embarras the newest member of CSP. This may force CSP to commit more forces from other memebers to the region, making space elsewhere in the world.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Mafia Pruszkowska

A drug cartel local to the islands that has been a victim of CSP stabilization operations and wants them off the island.
The cartel in the past was supplied with weapons by the Virelian Intelligence Agency to fuel their fight against CSP peacekeepers.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>

Location: Airfield

Badly equipped force with some support assets, thrust into the CSP's Peace and Stability program after joining the alliance. They are highly motivated to show their worth on the international stage. After establishing themselves on the airfield they began supporting and leading operations against the cartel.

Local police force conducting patrols and on the ground work against the cartel under cover from Asartan Peacekeepers.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>

Lightly equipped thugs hired to defend the company's property against the mafia's influence.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

missions.name: Anteater
missions.summary: Contractors rescue a stricken tank

briefing.mission:
Yesterday after heavy fighting inside the town Her Majesty's forces have been beaten back and were forced to withdraw. While retreating, a Pandur IFV has struck an anti-tank mine wounding its crew and passengers, during the ensuing firefight, a Leopard tank "Anteater" was struck in the left track by an RPG, breaking it, the tank turned sharply and the other track walked off. Unable to move and with many wounded among accompanying infantry they were surrounded and cut off. As the gunfight raged into the night, immediate risks were dealt with, but with approaching daylight, it is certain their position is in grave danger. During the night a supply drop from a helicopter has been shot down with shoulder launched surface-to-air missile and crashed into a nearby building.

With Khaybaran forces stretched thin over the frontline, the stricken "Anteater" and its escort need rescuing from their position deep in the town. With dawn soon approaching and reserves still hours away they require assistance. Synixe has been ordered to rescue the tank and its escort.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Repair "Anteater"
- Bring "Anteater" back to safety
- Don't let drone be destroyed

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Support Khaybaran troops

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Main gun is irreparably damaged
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>

Khaybaran forces lacking manpower in the area are unable to rescue the force left behind in the city.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>

Militia force concentrated inside the city as wide minefields force Khaybaran units into the chokepoint. The heaviest resistance comes in the north-eastern part of Al Salman where they are holding chokepoints with their support assets.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>

Khaybaran forces unable to both hold position and rescue the stricken team, they will remain outside of town until reinforcements arrive. Khaybaran recon drone has been diverted and is in orbit around the encircled troops, standing by to provide overwatch.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians have fled the frontline.

missions.name: Apex Predator
missions.summary: Contractors disrupt testing of an experimental tank

briefing.mission:
About a week ago a delegation from Chernarus arrived on island of Tanoa. Three engineers from Chernogorsk Locomotive Plant, including deputy of the CTO - Simon Federov, are overseeing the delivery and testing of a prototype T-100 series tank shown at Arms Expo in Novigrad. Satellite pictures of the La Rochelle Aerodrome show unloading of one railgun turret and two hulls.

The mountain testing, important to the Horizon Islands government is due to start. The endurance testing is being run in the Red Spring open pit mine, by maintenance platoon of 3rd Company of Alpini stationed at Comms Bravo.

Accomodation of the foreign delegation from CLF is being provided by a local hotel nearby the airfield.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy railgun tank prototype
- Retrieve the prototype manuals
- Capture program's lead engineer
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>

Treidan has received information that Horizon Islands Government has reached a deal with Chernogorsk Locomotive Plant about the export of the recently shown railgun prototype of their T-100 tank.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>

Location: Aerodrome, Comms Alpha and Bravo, Red Spring

Well equipped military force, with a very small amount of support assets.

Name: Horizon Island Police

They have increased presence in the nearby towns and villages to protect the secrecy of the project.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilian life goes on as normal

missions.name: Glasshouse
missions.summary: Contractors break out and redeem a prisoner

briefing.mission:
Three days ago, Horizon Islands Police served a warrant for an arrest for Leszek Nawrocki, a young high placed executive doing fieldwork for Integra Group in the Tanoa archipelago, for embezzlement of public funds.

His mother has contracted Synixe to break out her son and clear his name by recovering his work laptop with data that would exonerate him. Leszek is scheduled to be moved from local sheriff's office to police station in Lijnhaven where he will await his trial. Monika Nawrocka has also organized his extraction out of the country. Synixe is tasked to deliver him to a jungle temple for handover.

The whole island is on the edge with Volunteer Guard garrison standing by on the airfield on quick reaction force to respond to incursions by Syndikat.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Rescue Leszek
- Recover Leszek's laptop
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Monika Nawrocka

Mother of Leszek and prominent business woman in the exotic wood industry. She claims her son, Leszek, was unjustly jailed by Horizon Islands Government and blames the company for framing Leszek with embezzlement of public money.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Horizon Islands
Location: Towns

Combination of Gendarmerie and Police forces has significantly cracked down on Syndikat's operations and forced them into hiding. They have set up armed patrols in the towns and along main roads and are cooperating with Horizon Islands Volunteer Guard.

Name: SOLID Security

Livonian security company hired to protect Integra Group operations in the area. They have cooperated with law enforcement and allowed the capture of Leszek.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>

Militia force hiding in the jungle during the recent crackdown. They are paranoid and will fire at contractors.

missions.name: Heavy Burden
missions.summary: Contractors distrupt militia

briefing.mission:
Anti-government forces have not been contained and recently begun crossing the river. This situation critically endangers the bauxite mines in Mbokoko which significant parts of the Viatkan aviation industry rely on. Upcoming elections make direct military action unfeasible for now and they have contracted Synixe to conduct a swift strike across the river.

Primary target is a mortar battery, currently believed to be stationed in the town of Danashiwa. Second point of interest is the nearby airstrip that is currently being prepared to house GA aircraft that are used for reconnaissance. Additionally Synixe is to raid the maintenance facilities set up in Kyari Kinnai where they convert civilian vehicles into armored technicals.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Silence the mortars
- Take over airstrip
- Damage repair facility

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Capture Hugo Molina
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Viatka

Viatkan government is very concerned with the security of bauxite mining operations in the north of Kujari region. Unable to mobilize support for direct military action, they contracted Synixe to conduct a show of force against the rebellion.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Solo Forza

A popular movement leading a civil war in Mbokoko. They are equipped with varied stolen gear, leading pushes with technicals and terror bombings with mortars. Many of the government's counteroffensives have encountered anti-tank mines on approach and were ambushed near the crossings. With government troops abandoning their positions along the river, the rebels are pushing north and have gained ground in the east. They are led by Hugo Molina, a ruthless former general of the Mbokokan army.

Name: Groupe Valmont

Hired as advisors by an unknown source, they help with operation of specialized equipment and act as personal detail of regional commanders. They also serve as forward observers and call in mortar fire missions.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Mbokokan Gendarmerie
Location: North of the river

Beaten back from the river crossing they have retreated to the north.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians are fleeing the war.

missions.name: Heavy Rain
missions.summary: Contractors go where an army has failed

briefing.mission:
Yesterday Karskoyan army was pushed out the power plant area by an infantry attack from the east. They immediately counter-attacked with armor support but they have been beaten back by anti-tank missile teams hastily occupying the original defenses.

With depleted manpower they have turned to Synixe to conduct offensive operations.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy anti-tank positions near power plant
- Overtake airfield

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Destroy ammo caches

Professional army with limited heavy assets in the area. They rely on man portable support weapons.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Karskoyan Army
Location: West of AO

Professional army with depleted reserves after costly counterattack.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians have fled the area.

missions.name: Leaning Tower of Ivory
missions.summary: Contractors extract a fugitive from captivity

briefing.mission:
The client's brother, Hugo, has been away from the country for months and has now been captured. An insider in the Altis Armed Forces (AAF) reported that a prisoner exchange is due to take place at the vehicle depot near Kore. The exchange is between the AAF and the Kavalan cartel, who want a "foreign-born Freedom and Independence Army (FIA) cell leader." In text messages to his brother, Hugo said that he and the cartel were planning operations against an AAF outpost near Fournos.

The client believes that the cartel is behind Hugo's capture. Synixe has been contracted to rescue Hugo and neutralize the Entente boss.

The column of cars has just left the mansion, leaving only few guards inside the compound.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Retrieve Hugo
- Neutralize Maurice Lu

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Help FIA soldiers
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Chris Sangheili

Chris Sangheili is an investment banker from Argana. He and his brother fled the country after their father was killed for supporting the Tura during the First Arganan Civil War. Chris became a banker, while his brother, after a short stint in the Illanzian Foreign Legion, became a freedom fighter for various causes. His brother has now been captured by a local cartel, which wants to trade him for one of their own being held by the AAF.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Entente
Location: Southern Altis

Well armed cartel led by Maurice Lu, now cooperating with AAF against the FIA.

Name: Altis Armed Forces

Decently well equipped force, majority of their forces continue north, to push FIA out of the forests and mountains. They are searching hills for small band east of Kavala.

Name: Altis Police

They control the peace in a wartorn region. They placed many roadblocks and want to disrupt FIA operations behind their lines.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Freedom Independence Army

Beaten back, now hiding in the mountain and forest regions on western part of Altis


<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilian life slowly going back to normal.

missions.name: Minor Transgression
missions.summary: Contractors rescue corporate tourists

briefing.mission:
The CFO of Holmium, Ed Zitron, alongside his brother-in-law George, has been visiting the local area to see what the on-the-ground reality of their company is. The corporation usually doubles up on security, relying on local keys of power as well as mercenaries to keep their operation running smoothly.

Unknown to the corporation, the Neron Clan, its local partner, secured outside support and turned on the operation, attacking the ION compound. Ed, suffering from malaria, had been resting inside the ION compound and was taken hostage by the attackers. Holmium has entered talks with the Neron Clan for Ed's release. They managed to put a worm on one of the hostage takers' computers that they have not shut down. This gives us a live feed of Ed's current position.

While Ed was down with malaria, George was visiting the employee housing in Horasan. There is no information about his current whereabouts.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Rescue Ed Zitron
- Rescue George Zitron
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Holmium Inc.

Mining conglomerate specializing in extracting resources from areas of instability.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Neron Clan
Location: North of the swamp

Militia force with some regularly trained and equipped elements. They have taken possession of the garrison's equipment.

Name: Unknown group

Well trained and equipped force of presumably mercenaries, supporting regional ambitions of Neron Clan.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: ION

Their whereabouts and allegiance are currently unknown.

Aside from few civilian vehicles the garrison contained:
- APC
- RAM with remote weapon station
- Polaris DAGR
- 2x Arcadian


<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Life goes on as normal.

missions.name: Persona Non Grata
missions.summary: Contractors rush ahead of an offensive to secure intel

briefing.mission:
2nd Arganan Civil War has been raging for weeks now. With two of the rebel sides in an uneasy ceasefire, they have started pushing the government forces in rapid fashion.

One member of the Arganan ballistic missile program has defected to the Sefrawi side and has offered to transfer schematics of the missile's navigation systems as well as source code to the electronic counter-countermeasures used.

Unfortunately, with power outages in the region, he has driven closer to the frontline to the town of Mantiq, which has set a strict curfew enforced with police patrols and he was unable to break out. Due to the communication going through unsecured GSM network, and a rumour that manhunt team from Groupe Valmont has been dispatched to find him, he chose not to disclose his location directly. His friend left a note in Rasman's Market on a "Chicken Street".

Synixe has been contracted to break through the frontlines and secure the vital intel.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Retrieve vital intel

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Retrieve informant
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Sefrawi Provisional Government
Location: Eastern part of River Valley

A Sefrawi informant inside the Arganan ballistic missile program has extracted important information about the program. With both Sefrawi and Turan forces advancing on Mantiq his security is now at risk. The Sefrawi Provisional Government want the informant and his information extracted safely from the town.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Arganan Army
Location: Around Mantiq

The Arganan Army, on the brink of collapse in the region, they have just lost Rasman Airport and are currently holding the hills to the southeast of the city.

Name: Arganan National Police and Army Reserves
Location: In Mantiq

Badly-equipped backline forces, they are preparing the HQ to retreat with Turan and Sefrawi forces approaching.
According to information from Sefrawi informants, the HQ in the city consists of only a small garrison, and significant number of National Police.

Name: Groupe Valmont

PMC manhunt team has reportedly been dispatched to find the informant and prevent the capture of his data.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Tura Insurgency
Location: South

A militia force with popular support in the rural regions. Despite the current weak ceasefire with Sefrawi Provisional Government, Synixe operation is unsanctioned.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Most of the civilians have fled the area.

missions.name: Privateer
missions.summary: Contractors hunt down pirates

briefing.mission:
The pirates from Gorgados Islands are getting more brazen by the day, while previously attacking smaller vessels, they have shot at and seized very big containership the MV Nevertaken. This situation is unacceptable and while talks with the government of the islands the pirates operate out of is stalling.

NeverBlue has sent few employees to the islands posing as tourists and managed to get few interviews:

- One mother from Yanukka, said she lost her son. When police produced the very mangled body, they said "He fell from the radio tower", despite him never going that far south as he knew there was trouble. She claims the police actively works with the pirates.

- Catholic priest from Balavu has said that a truck comes in and around 20 young men get into it and drive north. A few weeks later they come back with mosquito bites and heavy tan similar to the fishermen.

- One man from Katkoula said his estranged brother gets on rigid inflatable boat going around the cape, to the northwest and dissapears for few weeks at a time.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Eliminate the pirate camps
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: NeverBlue Marine Corporation

A maritime shipping company, focused on container movement across the ocean. One of their ships recently fell victim to a pirate group operating out of Gorgados Islands and the company had to pay the ransom for ship and the crew. After unsuccessful talks with the island's authority they decided to contract Synixe to break down the criminal gangs engaging in piracy in the nearby sea.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Unknown pirate groups
Location: Southwestern islands

There is no information on the group's composition. The security footage from MV Nevertaken shows armed men approaching on fast boats with machineguns firing across the deck.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Gorgados Police

Underfunded, corrupt and apathetic to the pirate groups as long as they don't cause trouble on the island.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians continue to live their normal lives.

missions.name: Scorched Horizon
missions.summary: Contractors help disrupt communications

briefing.mission:
Last month's election results have been internationally disputed due to the widespread use of the Luban Army to guard the polling places, leading to severe voter intimidation.
The government has said those measures had to be taken due to the terror threat caused by supporters of the Luban Liberation Front.
With the vote blocked in UN Security Council, Mbakoran Army moved in a thunder run into the capital without firing a shot and oversaw the swearing-in of provisional LLF Government.
The Military, in disarray has mostly joined the new government, with small pockets of resistance.

The Khaybaran government, a supporter of the previous regime has vowed to restore peace in Luba. Ahead of the invasion Khaybaran special forces have infiltrated through the frontline to target enemy C2.
With one of the teams missing in the Dariyah region, Synixe was contracted to fulfill their mission of destroying the local cellular network ahead of attack. The invasion will begin at H-Hour with a missile barrage and subsequent mechanized assault into Ben Guerrir. After accomplishing their objectives Synixe is to support assault into Ben Guerrir.

H-Hour has been set for 07:20 local time.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy Radio Masts
- Provide support to advancing force

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Find lost SOF team
- Destroy heavy assets in AO

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Do not enter Al Hariq and Ben Guerrir before H-Hour
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: United Khaybaran States

Khaybaran Government approved Resolution 67 and have begun preparation for an operation to restore the announced winner of the fall election.
Amidst the bombing campaign Khaybaran Special Forces have infiltrated behind enemy lines and destroyed enemy C3 support.
One of the teams has not reported back and lacking manpower they have decided to contract Synixe to finish their mission.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Luban Liberation Front

Supporters of the losing party in the internationally disputed elections. The border area has seen the most resistance and left mostly militia with majority of the troops defecting across the border leaving mostly milita in charge. They wear green armbands.

Name: Mbakora
Location: Frontline

Supporters of LLF, after international condemnation of fall election, they drove tanks straight into capital of Haut-Lomami and have put provisional government of LLF in charge.
Now with the threat of invasion looming they have deployed along the frontline as the primary army in charge.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: United Khaybaran States
Location: Frontline

Her Majesty's Armed Forces are standing by for H-Hour and in this sector their main target is Ben Guerrir.

Name: Luban Union
Location: Pockets of resistance and frontline

Remainder of Luban Army loyal to the previous government. They will be joining Khaybaran forces in the main attack.


<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Location: Towns

Civilian population has been ordered to not leave towns

missions.name: Shadow of Intent
missions.summary: Contractors hunt a terrorist

briefing.mission:
Sadiq Naeem has joined and currently leads IaS in the Manfalat region of Takisan. He and his closest lieutenants are known for wearing ballistic masks to hide their faces. Sadiq himself uses a mask adorned with anime-styled drawing.

IaS has recently seized a base in Garmsar after a heavy gunfight with enemies coming over the hills. Additionally, the base in Feruz Abad has gone silent. In this area, Sadiq's clique is sure to be implicated. Synixe has been contracted to investigate those two threads and produce a body.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Neutralize Sadiq Naeem
<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Bring in Sadiq alive
- Rescue survivors of the attack
briefing.situation:
Six months ago Sadiq Naeem, along with 4 men and two stewards, seized Karskoyan Airlines Flight 67 and have diverted it and subsequently landed it in contested area of Takistan. Most of the passangers and crew have been let free except 5 Karskoyan civil servants who have been summarily executed live on TV based on their government passes.

<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Karskoya

Internationally known terrorist, Sadiq Naeem, who is behind the hijacking of Karskoyan Airlines Flight 67.He has shown himself and security apparatus of Karskoya wants us to produce the body.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Ikhwan as-Sayf
Location: South and east of Rasman

Sadiq Naeem has joined and is leading IaS forces in the Manfalat region of Takisan. Takistani forces describe him as very cunning, known for using subterfuge to bait Taki forces into an ambush. They have recently been supplied with MANPADS by an unknown source.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Takistan
Location: Rasman

After recent defeats, local Takistani forces are in retreat and are primarily holding the airport.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians have fled the immediate area.

missions.name: Sleeping Warrior
missions.summary: Contractors sabotage operations of an army

briefing.mission:
After a swift campaign the island of Haranis has been conquered by Illianzian forces. Over the past weeks they have hunted down local resistance from the former garrison and civilians who picked up arms.

Illanzian tactics consist of a rapid and overwhelming response to threats and they have managed to decimate friendly rebel forces in a very short time. Their forces now are much more spread out on the island and the time to strike is now. Synixe has been contracted to destroy anti-air facilities at Mike-26. The air station also contains significant logistical and intelligence importance to Illanzian forces on the island and previous attempts by FIA have been crushed by wide mobilization of forces in the nearby areas.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy anti-air capability of Air Station Mike-26
- Disrupt helicopter refueling point at Camp Rogain
- Sabotage vehicle storage near Agia Marina
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Nyrland

The occupation of the Island of Haranis by Illianzian forces is unacceptable to the government of Nyrland. Originally supporting the local resistance, with the Illanzians' heavy use of fast reaction forces to quell any local actions they have turned to unconventional means and hired Synixe to disrupt the occupier.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Illanzian Armed Forces

Decently well armed, and very well organized force, known for their prowess in COIN operation by using very flexible and reaction force oriented tactics that have decimated FIA operations. They currently have a transport helicopter and wheeled tank at their disposal.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: FIA
Location: Hiding in forests

Decimated by actions of Illanzian forces they have gone into hiding.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilian life goes on as normal.

missions.name: Under The Canopy
missions.summary: Contractors neutralize threat to aviation

briefing.mission:
Three days ago a chapter of the Sons of Coming Dawn have taken control over the northeastern island of Gull Archipelago, and have burned down Imaska Radar Station and seized its assets. Among the assets were two H215 transport helicopters, one target acquisition radar, two SAM launchers, Wiesel mounted with Stinger missiles and SU-100 in state of disrepair. Synixe has been contracted by the manufacturer to destroy the newly delivered surface to air missile battery due to severe risk to the nearby wind corridor used by civilian aviation. Wrecks of both helicopters remain on base among the rubble but other assets remain unaccounted for.

Yesterday with the arrival of Josonese transport plane and announcement of transfer of arms and training to the militia group, the situation became more dangerous. Synixe is to destroy any found weapon shipments. As of now client believes they haven't yet been moved from the airfield to militia strongpoint of La Mera.

Friendly contact on the ground, a local used car salesman, offered help with transportation and intelligence. He has since gone dark and the pictures he shared before, unfortunately did not possess any EXIF data and are of poor quality. The government wishes for him to be extracted. João Almeida has dragon hand tattoos, ear piercings and has great affinity for golden jewelry.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Neutralize SAM site in Thetra
- Destroy Wiesel armored weapons carrier
- Destroy weapon shipment


<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Recover João Almeida
- Capture Robert Broad
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: MKB Almaz

Rebellion in the archipelago has seized brand new anti air assets that have been sold to the government. Due to reputational risk to the manufacturer, they have contracted Synixe to destroy these assets.

Name: Gull Islands Government

Government has shared on-the-ground intelligence with MKB Almaz via their contact, João Almeida. He stopped responding while scouting a location in Thetra and government wants to retrieve him if possible.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Sons of Coming Dawn

Militia under the leadership of Robert Broad. They have seized the northwestern island and have refused to step down. They have taken control of government's brand new missile battery and an armored weapons carrier.

Name: Joson
Location: Airfield

Josonese Airborne Forces have landed a contingent on the airfield and are currently training local forces on use of newly supplied equipment. Second plane is currently mid-air refueling and will arrive on the island shortly.

<font color='#139120'>INDEPENDENT FORCES</font>
Name: Police

Current allegiance of the police force on the island is unknown.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilian presence in the area.

missions.name: World of Tomorrow
missions.summary: Contractors investigate anomalous behaviour

briefing.mission:
Two days ago a huge burst of low frequency radiation was detected on a site of former radio station Mike 69 on an island of Tanna, part of Asartan Antilles.

The subsequent imaging of the site shows Asartan engineers constructing a dome in the place of an old radar building and setting up makeshift base around the area.

Primary objective is neutralization of the air defense network so that Khaybaran air force can conduct air strikes and bury the site. Client wants us to document the site, capture any intel and bring back any personnel involved in the operation of the site.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy anti-air defenses
- Investigate and collect information from the site at Mike-69

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Capture personnel related to operations at Mike-69

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>

Anti air defenses must be destroyed
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Khaybaran Bureau of Special Investigation

Foreign Intelligence Arm directly serving Her Majesty.
Due to very short timeline and Khaybaran involvement in the Luban Civil War, they are unable to organize an infiltration or strike using state assets. They have hired Synixe to recon the site in force.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Asartan Armed Forces
Location: Mike-69, Airfield

While generally a weakly equipped force, they brought a lot of their specially trained units to the area and set up an air defense network around the site.

Name: Asartan Police

Blocking major ways in and out of the area.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

Civilians have been evacuated from the immediate area

missions.name: Last Friday Night
missions.summary: Contractors clean up a politician's drunken mistakes

briefing.mission:
Last week Oskar Mazur, a local politician, was attending a nightclub outside of the region. There, he was caught on video discussing the people he serves in an extremely negative light, calling them the likes of "disgusting" and "freeloaders" which ultimately ended up in local outrage in the already unstable region. 

Mazur's big push for agricultural outreach and progress to stave off famine makes him a valuable asset to the Integrated Economic Alliance, specifically to Virelia. Whilst the IEA and Virelia detest the comments made by Mazur, they wish for him to be transported safely out of the region.

The only lead given to Synixe from Virelia is Mazur's big hobby in offroading. The last contact with Mazur was with his mechanic Davren, whose automobile repair center is located west of Hakamäki.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Rescue Oskar Mazur alive

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Secure Mazur's assets
- Disable hostile operations in the region
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Integrated Economic Alliance (IEA) and Virelian Intelligence Agency (VIA)

With rising tensions, the IEA and the VIA are looking to move a valuable asset to safety.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Ihantalan Militia Forces

An armed militia formed by an anti-government movement seeking to uncover Mazur's motives and governmental plans.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Most if not all of the non-combatant locals have fled to safety outside of the region.

missions.name: Rock and Stoned...?
missions.summary: Intercept an enemy convoy and recover an undercover police operator

briefing.mission:
An undercover Aliabad Regional Police operator reports that the Coltan Mine is being used as a cover for a lucrative black market storage site. As police forces have been driven back by local freedom fighters, they have hired Synixe as a last resort. Ikhwan as-Sayf has hired a group of professionals as "private security" for the mine after assaulting and securing Wolak.

Coltan Mine was raided by an Aliabad Regional Police SWAT team who failed to make entry to the mine. The same insider has given Aliabad Regional Police details of the convoy. The target vehicle is a cargo LUT carrying multiple boxes. Also in the convoy is an armed technical and a transport LUT carrying the remaining forces out of the mine, including the insider "Mohammad Islami" who is to be recovered and not harmed.

The convoy will step off around 06:15 local time. It will head south from the mine, turning east from Wolak. It will continue through Hadiz, then south through Narmaki, continuing south until they have left the region.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Intercept the convoy 
- Destroy the target vehicle
- Destroy assets being transported
- Recover and extract Mohammad Islami safely

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Support Aliabad Regional Police forces
- Hinder or destroy Ikhwan as-Sayf forces or assets
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Aliabad Regional Police
Location: Scattered across south-western villages.

An undercover operator has actionable intelligence suggesting that the Coltan Mine is being used as a cover for a lucrative black market storage site. As the police have been driven back by local freedom fighters, they have hired Synixe as a last resort.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Ikhwan as-Sayf
Location: Defending Wolak and surrounding areas.

Local freedom fighters who have persistently attacked police forces. After taking Wolak, Ikhwan as-Sayf has taken control of the Coltan Mine and is defending the surrounding area, using it as leverage against the government. Wolak is heavily defended as it is the sole entrance to the Coltan Mine.

Name: The Professionals
Location: Operating a lucrative black market out of the Coltan Mine

This group of professionals was hired to assist Ikhwan as-Sayf as "private security." Intelligence indicates that Ikhwan as-Sayf and The Professionals have struck a deal: The Professionals provide money and weapons, and in return Ikhwan as-Sayf stays quiet about their location and motives.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Aliabad Regional Police
Location: Scattered across south-western villages.

The police have set up patrols in Dawlatsah, Ahmad Golam, Darshag, Narmaki, Hadiz, and Abad. There are two checkpoints, one located in Hadiz on the MSR, and one south of Ahmad Golam. Forces from Wolak and Katal have been pushed back into Abad, acting to defend the village. The checkpoint in Hadiz was attacked at 3 AM local time and have made no contact since.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Due to the recent and ongoing violence, all civilians have fled the area.

missions.name: One If By Land Two If By Sea
missions.summary: The Virelian Intelligence Service has hired Synixe to extract an operative

briefing.mission:
The Virelian Intelligence Service has hired Synixe to extract an operative.

Undercover operative John Smith has supposedly been arrested for a traffic incident in Drovak. Before his real identity is discovered he needs to be extracted.

Contractors will be transported to the Drovak coast under cover of night aboard the CS Artful. Once ashore contractors will have to find their own land transportation. Contractors may be able to acquire civilian vehicles in the nearby coastal towns of Nizhnoye and/or Solnichniy. Once transportation is acquired, Virelian intelligence believes that their Agent Smith may have been arrested by police from either Dolina or Mogilevka and may be being held in one of their jails.

Virelian intelligence stresses that we are to leave no trace of our being here. If contractors are engaged they are to leave no witnesses that can identify them.

While brief skirmishes with local police may go unnoticed, prolonged encounters are far more likely to cause issues. Contractors are advised to avoid the naval port in Electrozavodsk. If the Drovak military is alerted to the contractors presence they will most likely respond with air support from their nearby carrier group. Contractors are advised to not be followed back to the rendezvous. If a tail is detected, the captain of the Artful has orders to submerge and leave the contractors behind in order to remain undetected.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
Extract agent John Smith alive.

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
Leave no witnesses that can identify contractors or point to any involvement of Virelia.

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
Do not be followed back to the CS Artful.
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelian Intelligence Service


<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Drovak Police and Military
Location: Police can be found throughout the region at stations or patrolling. The nearest military base is a port in Elektrozavodsk, there is also a carrier group stationed off the Souterhn coast.

Police should be lightly armed and armored. If John Smith's cover is blown then state police may be involved and will be far better equipped. The Drovak military is well armed and has several naval and air assets in the region.

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: CS Artful
Location: South East of Solnichny

Virelian nuclear submarine tasked with delivering and extracting the contractors.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Drovak General Public
Location: Throughout the region.

While most citizens are probably sleeping, not everyone has a day job.

missions.name: Back On The Grind
missions.summary: Contractors are tasked with delivering aid

briefing.mission:
Recently a small scale civil conflict has erupted in Chernarus, with a group of government dissidents comprised by local disenfranchised young men wreaking havoc on the Chernarussian countryside.

With supplies and services being cut off to the towns in the region, IDAP has established several relief points throught the countryside. Since they are worried that these men will open fire on aid workers while they deliver supplies, they've opted to hire Synixe for the deliveries.

Contractors must deliver the required supplies to the different IDAP camps and centres while adhereing to the restrctions stipulated. There is also an IDAP train outbound from the Elektrzavodsk Railyard meant to deliver supplies to which contractors must deliver supplies. Contractors failing to adhere to these restrctions could result in the contract being cancelled.

Delivery list:
- Elektrzavodsk Railyard: Equipment kit (Supply box, Exposives box and Uniforms Box), truckload of food, 8x box of medical supplies
- Kozlovka: 2x Heap of grain, 2x Heap of rice, 2x box of medical supplies
- Putoshka: 4x box of medical supplies
- Stary Sobor: Equipment kit (Supply box, Exposives box and Uniforms Box), 4x box of medical supplies

Contractors have been provided with IDAP trucks for easier delivery of the supplies, with the truck bound for the railyard having already been loaded.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Deliver aid to the different IDAP locations

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Aid any civilians that are encountered

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Contractors must not participate in any engagements while in the IDAP camps and centres.
- Contractors must not carry any weapons while riding in IDAP marked vehicles or while within IDAP camps and centres.
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: International Development and Aid Project (IDAP)
Location: Chernogorsk, Elektrzavodsk Railyard, Kozlovka, Putoshka, Stary Sobor

Founded in mid 1916, the IDAP is a Dutch NGO that specialises in responding to natural and man-made disasters. Since its founding, the IDAP has provided humanitarian aid to more than sixty million people worldwide and continues to run missions throughout the Green Sea region, Central America, Southern Europe, West Africa, and the South Pacific.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Local Rebel Group
Location: Myshkino

They are equipped with old surplus weaponry that was previously owned or was recently acquired by its members. Reports have them wearing surplus gear as well, mostly composed of chest rigs.

missions.name: Bad Decisions
missions.summary: Contractors must rescue an SOF team and their pilots

briefing.mission:
Currently Karskoya is running peacekeeping mission in the region due to the ever-growing Sons of the Coming Dawn movement that is causing unrest.

Three hours ago a helicopter carrying a Karskoyan Army SOF team to a mission in the main island went down and contact was lost. Since contractors have been helping out the Karskoyan Army they're being sent in to rescue the SOF team and their two pilots.

We have their approximate locations due to ESAT beacons being activated.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Rescue the four-man SOF team and their two pilots
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name:  Karskoya and the IEA

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Sons of the Coming Dawn
Location: All throughout the main island

A militia force with varying degrees of equipment and an array of light vehicles at their disposal

<font color='#1d69f6'>FRIENDLY FORCES</font>
Name: Karskoyan Army
Location: Säyvö and Vähäsomerikonlahti

They currently hold the airbase and a small landing point at Vähäsomerikonlahti

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Present all throughout the AO except for the Karskoyan army locations.

missions.name: Bad News
missions.summary: Contractors sabotage a coup before it takes place

briefing.mission:
For the last six months the VIA has been keeping tabs in a situation that's been developing in the region, a local miltia group has been gathering men and supplies in anticipation for a coup attempt on the local government.

They lacked the equipment to actually go forward with the coup, but that recently changed in the last week when they received a significant equipment and weapons shipment delivered by Groupe Valmont, who are suspected of acting in behalf of another country.

Contractors are therefore being hired to destroy the delivered assets to prevent the coup from taking place.

A Virelian UAV along with an informant inside the militia were able to provide the composition of the shipment via imaging as well as confirming that Valmont has some operatives on the ground training and aiding the militia.

However the informant has since failed to check in so he's being considered MIA, therefore the VIA would like contractors to extract his family from the country before they are killed. Additionally, the UAV has had to exit the AO upon confirmation of enemy AA, as a result of all of this the exact location of the items from the shipment is unknown.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Sabotage the coup by destroying enemy assets

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Rescue the informant's family
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Virelian Intelligence Agency (VIA) and Local Government

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Local Militia Group
Location: Western region, between Länsikylä and Uski

A militia group comprised of local military aged males who are discontent with the government. They aim to overthrow it and establish their own regime. They are armed with old weapons and some chest rigs.

Name: Groupe Valmont
Location: Western region, between Länsikylä and Uski

A well equipped PMC group who is arming the militia. Suspected to be acting on behalf of an unknown country.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Informant's Family
Location: Informant's house, Uski

The family of the informant that provided the VIA with intelligence, composed of the man's wife and young son.

Aditional civilians might be present in the AO.

missions.name: Black Hole Sun
missions.summary: Contractors secure and extract Altis's lead weapons scientists

briefing.mission:
The IEA has become increasingly worried that Altis's weapons research and development program has become too advanced. Intelligence suggests they're developing superior technology in several fields including helicopters, handheld weaponry and experimental weaponry.

Therefore they have hired Synixe to deploy to Stratis, which has been used as the base for the weapons program for the last 20 years, and secure the scientists mainly associated with the program.

Contractors must secure the scientists in charge of the helicopter research in Camp Rogain, handheld weapons research in the Kamino Firing Range, and the scientists in charge of something under the codename Alpha-Omega-3 which is being developed in the Stratis Airbase.

Below is the amount of scientists assigned to each program:
- Helicopter research: 2 scientists
- Handheld weapons research: 3 scientists
- Alpha-Omega-3: 4 scientists
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Secure the lead scientists in Altis's weapons research and development program

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Sabotage any AAF assets you can
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Integrated Economies Alliance (IEA)
Location: Virelia, Karskoya, etc.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Altis Armed Forces (AAF)
Location: Camp Rogain, Kamino Firing Range, Stratis Airbase

A professional fighting force, equipped with mostly bullpup rifles and a wide array of assets at their disposal.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>
Name: Scientists
Location: Camp Rogain, Kamino Firing Range, Stratis Airbase

In charge of Altis's weapons research and development, they'll be stationed at the stated locations.

There is no further civilian presence on the island since it is military property.

missions.name: Call Me Maybe
missions.summary: Contractors destroy a weapons shipment and track down its dealer

briefing.mission:
For the last three months the Sons of the Coming Dawn milita movement has been gathering strength in the Korsac region of Lybor. In the beginning the KDF did not perceive them as a threat and since they're short staffed and lacking resources they decided to leave them be for the time being.

That all changed 2 weeks ago when an Interpol wiretap on international arms dealer Michael Jones confirmed that a weapons shipment was due to arrive at the SotCD stronghold in the town of Kinney, but by the time the KDF was able to set up an operation to stop the SotCD it was already too late and the shipment had already arrived.

Now the KDF is hiring Synixe to mobilize into the region and crush the SotCD by destroying their newfound supplies.

Additionally we're being asked by Interpol to track down and arrest Michael Jones, the wiretap confirms that he is still in the region and that the last call made from his personal cellphone was made at 15:51. Unfortunately Jones turned off his phone too quickly and as a result his exact location could not be obtained.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy the Sons of the Coming Dawn supplies
- Find and arrest Michael Jones

<font color='#E3D310'>RESTRICTIONS</font>
- Minimize damage to civilian infrastructure outside of Kinney
briefing.situation:
<font color='#e3d310'>EMPLOYER</font>
Name: Korsac Defense Forces
Location: Korsac

Currently short staffed and lacking resources, for this reason they're hiring Synixe.

Name: INTERPOL
Location: Lyon, France

The International Criminal Police Organization, commonly known as Interpol is an international organization that facilitates worldwide police cooperation and crime control.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>
Name: Sons of the Coming Dawn
Location: Kinney

A militia movement made up of local men. Recently they acquired new weapons and as such don't have a standard loadout, they carry a variety of rifles and vests. They also recently acquired some support assets.

<font color='#993399'>CIVILIAN CONSIDERATIONS</font>

missions.name: Cold Out Here
missions.summary: Contractors are tasked with recovering sensitive assets

briefing.mission:
Early in the morning, Site 7-B belonging to the Fjord Intelligence Agency was attacked by Groupe Valmont with the intent of obtaining several sensitive assets.

The assets consist of communications equipment along with servers that were prepped for transport in an Astra van, a device currently under R and D and three chemical containers.

Before Groupe Valmont could fully take over the facility a fireteam made it out of the site with the device in the back of a HEMTT truck. They're currently waiting in Port Nervei for an extraction.

For the time being Groupe Valmont has been contained to the Norrfjorden bay, as a roadblock was quickly established south of Igeldas to prevent them from heading South and the team at the Nervei Port has not seen any movement headed West.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>

Recently a daring raid by Ikhwan as-Sayf on a military base allowed them to get away with the bases's weapons stash. Since the government can't spare the manpower to get back the weapons they've hired Synixe to do so.

- 5 cases of stolen Basic Weapons
- 4 cases of stolen Launchers

missions.name: Stop It
missions.summary: Contractors prevent more bombings on civlians

briefing.mission:
For the past several months, Dal Riada has been steadily advancing into the region, gradually occupying all territory in its path. As is common during an invasion, a local militia was formed and has been conducting operations against the occupying forces.

Recently, Dal Riada's advance has stalled in this region. In an apparent attempt to demoralize the civilian population, they have begun conducting air strikes against civilian settlements. Two days ago, they bombed the central towns of Gullanabba and Yaber, crippling rail lines and port facilities.

Unable to effectively counter these air attacks, the FIA requested assistance from Virelia. Virelia has provided funding, allowing the FIA to hire private military contractors to reinforce their capabilities.

Synixe has been contracted to assault Dal Riada's airbases in the region and destroy their air assets. Additionally, Synixe is authorized to destroy any other Dal Riada military equipment, infrastructure, or assets encountered during the operation.

To facilitate the assault on the southernmost airbase, the FIA has concealed several dinghies near the church on the shores of Lake Nejsjön.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Destroy Dal Riada's air assets.

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Destroy any other Dal Riadan military assets encountered.

The FIA has requested assistance from Virelia to halt the Dal Riadan advance. As Virelia is unable to deploy troops directly, it has provided funding to enable the FIA to hire PMCs in support of their operations.

<font color='#d81717'>ENEMY FORCES</font>

missions.name: There's A Bomb In My Car
missions.summary: Contractors recover stolen vehicles

briefing.mission:
Last night a break in occurred at Bakir Bahrami's villa near Zargabad; a local militia group paid off his previous security team and made off with Bahrami's car collection.

As such, he's hired Synixe to track down and recover his vehicles. Thanks to witness accounts we know the approximate locations of most of the vehicles; they have been marked on your maps in yellow. It has also been reported that the militia has broken into the airport with trucks carrying Jeeps.

Bahrami's collection consists of the following:
- Arcadian: Black in color, with the license plate BIG POPPA
- Jeep: White in color, with the license plate JEEPERS
- Hatchback: Blue with a livery, with the license plate TOP GOONER
- SUV: Red in color, with the license plate NOT POOR

missions.name: Waterboy
missions.summary: Contractors take over following a failed operation

briefing.mission:
At midnight, a mission was launched to recover two undercover Karskoyan Intelligence Agency operatives from the airfield base on Utes. Unfortunately, both helicopters were shot down before they could land.

As a result, Synixe has been contracted to deploy to the island, extract the operatives, and neutralize the Livonian Defense Force's anti-aircraft capabilities.

The operatives consist of one maintenance worker wearing an orange vest and one laborer wearing a yellow hard hat. Both are carrying weapons to maintain their cover but will not engage contractors.

Additionally, Synixe is requested to rescue any surviving members of the two downed squads and recover the bodies of those killed, including the helicopter pilots where possible. We know that at least one pilot survived, as he was the individual who radioed in the report that the helicopters had been shot down. His last transmission indicated that he was hiding at a pier on the northern coast of the island.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Recover the Karskoyan Intelligence Agency operatives.
- Neutralize all anti-aircraft capabilities on the island

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Locate and recover any surviving members of the Karskoyan Special Operations Team as well as any bodies

missions.name: Against All Odds
missions.summary: Contractors rescue helicopter crew.

briefing.mission:
A Khaybaran recon helicopter has gone missing while doing reconnaissance East of the Fjord area. It moved out of its AO due to weather, and last known signals show it heading southeast to northwest across Oteren. Pilots reported taking AA fire immediately before contact was lost, which is concerning as there are no currently known AA emplacements in the area.

The only known recent activity in the region has been small scattered Sons of the Coming Dawn groups. Allies are concerned someone has begun supporting SotCD in the area, but have no intel to support the theory.

To prevent potential political mishaps, Synixe has been hired to recover the three crewmembers (or the remains thereof). Virelia and Khaybara would also like any intel Synixe is able to gather about groups operating in, or supporting others in the region.

missions.name: CSAR Salad
missions.summary: A mayday over Drakovac. A missing asset. Hostile territory

briefing.mission:
As part of COIN operations in Drakovac, Breznian Special Forces conducted a raid on the island of Lubenice with the objective of extracting a foreign asset codenamed “The Prince.” Virelian intelligence has since confirmed the asset’s identity as Mikhael Weiss.

During the extraction phase, the helicopter transporting the asset went down for unknown reasons somewhere north to northwest of Zatvorski Iogor. Synixe has been tasked with locating and recovering the asset, along with any other survivors, before Breznian forces can mount their own recovery effort and before hostile insurgent elements can find them.

Additional information:

Virelian intelligence recently intercepted Breznian internal communications regarding the incident:

02:38 - Extraction under fire reported
02:42 - Anomaly in controls detected
02:44 - Loss of control reported
02:47 - Mayday transmitted
02:49 - Final contact lost

Standard Breznian aircrew survival protocol instructs downed personnel to intermittently activate their transponder and relocate between transmissions to reduce the risk of detection by hostile forces. Using the intercepted data, Virelian intelligence has identified the frequency being used. The surviving aircrew have been transmitting approximately every 20 minutes, providing a narrow but actionable window for Synixe to track their movements.

In response to the incident, Breznian air assets have been temporarily grounded until Breznian command can confirm the aircraft was not brought down by hostile anti‑air systems.
briefing.objectives:
<font color='#E3D310'>PRIMARY</font>
- Secure "the Prince"
- Recover sensitive data from the crashsite

<font color='#595305'>SECONDARY</font>
- Capture survivors of the Breznian Special Forces team
